SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Frontend

Class Styling

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Frontend.Styling
public final class Styling extends Object
Shared visual tokens for the host UI.

The mutable colours are derived from the active AppTheme. Fonts and a few fixed overlay colours remain constant across themes.
